protocol_note: Merged from equivalent shards. Each circuit/seed uses the same fixed random-vector stuck-at protocol as ISCAS'85; sharding only changes offline scheduling.
runtime_note: offline FI/evaluation wall time summed from shards; not method runtime
archive_note: Independent 5-seed EPFL20 random-vector stability archive retained under a clean SEGR directory name. It is not used as a bridge source for the current selected-seed main table.
